member.name: T:ReqnrollConnector.AssemblyLoading.netFx.NetFxAssemblyProxy
member.summary: Runs inside the remote AppDomain; all calls from the host domain are marshalled transparently because this class inherits MarshalByRefObject. Keep return types to primitives/strings where possible to avoid accidental cross-domain type-identity issues.

member.name: M:ReqnrollConnector.AssemblyLoading.netFx.NetFxAssemblyProxy.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:ReqnrollConnector.AssemblyLoading.netFx.NetFxAssemblyProxy.ProbeDirectory(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Probes and its immediate subdirectories for {simpleName}.dll, skipping any path that is under a refs/ folder — mirrors the IsRefsPath filter shared by both RuntimeCompositeCompilationAssemblyResolver and TestAssemblyLoadContext.

member.name: M:ReqnrollConnector.AssemblyLoading.netFx.NetFxAssemblyProxy.ProbeNuGetCache(System.String,System.Version)
member.summary: Mirrors NugetCacheAssemblyResolver: probes %NUGET_PACKAGES%\{name}\{major}.{minor}.{build}\lib\{tfm}\{name}.dll using the same environment-variable resolution order. Version path uses major.minor.patch to match NuGet folder naming conventions.

member.name: M:ReqnrollConnector.AssemblyLoading.netFx.NetFxAssemblyProxy.IsRefsPath(System.String)
member.summary: Mirrors the IsRefsPath helper present in both RuntimeCompositeCompilationAssemblyResolver and TestAssemblyLoadContext. Rejects reference-only assemblies that live under a refs/ directory.

member.name: P:ReqnrollConnector.AssemblyLoading.netFx.NetFxAssemblyProxy.ImageRuntimeVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets the image runtime version.

member.name: P:ReqnrollConnector.AssemblyLoading.netFx.NetFxAssemblyProxy.TargetFrameworkName
member.summary: Gets or sets the target framework name.

member.name: P:ReqnrollConnector.AssemblyLoading.netFx.NetFxAssemblyProxy.TestAssemblyLocation
member.summary: Gets or sets the test assembly location.

member.name: P:ReqnrollConnector.AssemblyLoading.netFx.NetFxAssemblyProxy.TestAssemblyFullName
member.summary: Gets or sets the test assembly full name.

member.name: M:ReqnrollConnector.AssemblyLoading.netFx.NetFxAssemblyProxy.InvokeReqnrollBindingDiscoveryMethod(System.String)
member.summary: Gets or sets the invoke reqnroll binding discovery method.

member.name: M:ReqnrollConnector.AssemblyLoading.netFx.NetFxAssemblyProxy.AssemblyLocationFromAssemblyName(System.String)
member.summary: Gets or sets the assembly location from assembly name.

member.name: M:ReqnrollConnector.AssemblyLoading.netFx.NetFxAssemblyProxy.InitializeLifetimeService
member.summary: Gets or sets the initialize lifetime service.

member.name: M:ReqnrollConnector.Utils.ReflectionExtensions.ReflectionCallStaticMethod``1(System.Type,System.String,System.Type[],System.Object[])
member.summary: Gets or sets the reflection call static method.
